item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Tantangan utama adalah menjaga keseimbangan antara kedua prinsip ini tanpa menyebabkan diskriminasi atau ketidakadilan.

notes: No full reversal. Agent A begins society-first with a rights caveat, then shifts toward balance and individual-rights protection while still defending Indonesian collectivism. Agent B begins rights-first, moves somewhat toward a balance/social-justice frame, but remains anchored in individual rights as central to democracy.
